name: ai-implement
description: AI Contributor picks up an ai-ready issue and implements it

steps.description: Human reviews the implementation plan before AI starts coding

args.command: cargo check --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo test --workspace

args.title: [AI] {{steps.read_issue.title}}
args.head: {{steps.plan.branch_name}}
